nodes.name: Webhook - Receive Ticket
nodes.notes: Entry point. Chatbot POSTs here when a student raises any ticket.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'received', ticket_id: $json.ticket_id, message: 'Ticket logged successfully' }) }}

nodes.name: Respond to Chatbot
nodes.notes: Immediately ACK the chatbot so it does not hang.

nodes.name: Prepare Ticket Data
nodes.notes: Normalises incoming payload and computes due timestamps.

nodes.name: Is Complaint?
nodes.notes: Routes complaints to priority path; all others go to standard path.

parameters.subject: =🚨 COMPLAINT RAISED | {{ $json.ticket_id }} | {{ $json.student_name }} - {{ $json.city }}
parameters.message:
=

Complaint Ticket Raised

Ticket ID{{ $json.ticket_id }}
Student{{ $json.student_name }}
City{{ $json.city }}
Exam{{ $json.target_exam }}
Query Type{{ $json.query_type }}
Message{{ $json.message }}
Raised At{{ $json.raised_at_readable }}
Follow-up DueWithin 2 hours
Resolution DueWithin 24 hours

Action Required: Please contact this student within 2 hours. This is a complaint ticket and directly impacts satisfaction score.

Reply to this email with resolution notes or update the ticket in GrowthDesk dashboard.

nodes.name: Email Team - Complaint Alert
nodes.notes: Sends priority alert email to support team for complaints.

parameters.subject: =📋 New Ticket | {{ $json.ticket_id }} | {{ $json.query_type }} | {{ $json.student_name }}
parameters.message:
=

New Support Ticket

Ticket ID{{ $json.ticket_id }}
Student{{ $json.student_name }}
City{{ $json.city }}
Exam{{ $json.target_exam }}
Query Type{{ $json.query_type }}
Message{{ $json.message }}
Raised At{{ $json.raised_at_readable }}
Resolution DueWithin 24 hours

Please review and respond to this ticket within 24 hours to maintain our service standards.

nodes.name: Email Team - Standard Ticket
nodes.notes: Sends standard notification for Fees, Timing, General queries.

parameters.subject: =Your Support Request Received | {{ $json.ticket_id }} | GrowthDesk
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $json.student_name }},

We've received your support request and your ticket has been created successfully. You're in good hands! 🎓

Ticket ID{{ $json.ticket_id }}
Query Type{{ $json.query_type }}
StatusOpen — Team Notified
Expected ResponseWithin {{ $json.is_complaint ? '2 hours' : '24 hours' }}

While you wait, keep up your {{ $json.target_exam }} preparation! Consistency is the key to cracking it. 💪

If you have anything urgent, reply to this email directly.


Best wishes,
GrowthDesk Student Support Team

nodes.name: Email Student - Acknowledgement
nodes.notes: Sends acknowledgement to student confirming ticket receipt.

nodes.name: Cron - Check Pending Every Hour
nodes.notes: Runs every hour to check for tickets that have breached SLA.

nodes.name: Fetch Pending Tickets (DB)
nodes.notes: Replace with Postgres/Firebase node. Query: SELECT * FROM tickets WHERE status=Open AND raised_at < NOW()-2hrs

parameters.subject: =⏰ SLA BREACH WARNING | Pending Tickets Need Attention | GrowthDesk
parameters.message:
=

Pending Ticket SLA Alert

The following tickets have been open for more than 2 hours and need immediate attention:

Check Time: {{ $json.check_time_readable }}


DB Query to run:
{{ $json.query }}


Action Required:

  • Review all open tickets in your GrowthDesk dashboard
  • Prioritise complaint tickets first
  • Send resolution email to students
  • Update ticket status to Resolved in DB

Average satisfaction score drops below 3.0 when tickets are not resolved within SLA. Let's keep our students happy! 🎯

nodes.name: Email Team - SLA Breach Alert
nodes.notes: Hourly SLA breach alert to team for all overdue open tickets.

nodes.name: Webhook - Mark Ticket Resolved
nodes.notes: Team hits this endpoint when they resolve a ticket. POST: ticket_id, resolution_notes, resolved_by

nodes.name: Prepare Resolution Data
nodes.notes: Normalises resolution payload before sending emails.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'resolved', ticket_id: $json.ticket_id, message: 'Resolution emails sent' }) }}

nodes.name: Respond - Resolution ACK
nodes.notes: ACKs the resolution webhook immediately.

parameters.subject: =Your ticket {{ $json.ticket_id }} has been resolved | GrowthDesk
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $json.student_name }}, your issue is resolved! ✅

Great news — your support ticket has been resolved by our team. Here are the details:

Ticket ID{{ $json.ticket_id }}
Resolved At{{ $json.resolved_at_readable }}
Resolved By{{ $json.resolved_by }}
Resolution{{ $json.resolution_notes }}

We'd love to hear how we did! Please take 10 seconds to rate your experience:

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent ⭐⭐⭐ OK ⭐ Poor


Keep going strong with your {{ $json.target_exam }} preparation! You're closer than you think. 💪

Best wishes,
GrowthDesk Student Support Team

nodes.name: Email Student - Resolution + Feedback
nodes.notes: Sends resolution confirmation + satisfaction score request to student.

nodes.name: Webhook - Capture Satisfaction Score
nodes.notes: Student clicks rating link in email. GET params: ticket_id, score

nodes.name: Process Satisfaction Score
nodes.notes: Parses score from URL params. Updates DB. Triggers follow-up if score <= 2.

parameters.responseBody: =Thank you for your feedback! Score: {{ $json.satisfaction_score }}/5. Your response helps us improve our support for all JEE & CET students.

nodes.name: Respond - Thank You Page
nodes.notes: Shows thank you message when student clicks feedback link.

nodes.name: Score <= 2 (Poor)?
nodes.notes: If satisfaction score is 1 or 2, triggers team alert for follow-up.

parameters.subject: =⚠️ POOR SATISFACTION SCORE | {{ $json.ticket_id }} | Score: {{ $json.satisfaction_score }}/5
parameters.message:
=

Poor Satisfaction Score Alert

A student has rated their support experience as {{ $json.score_label }} ({{ $json.satisfaction_score }}/5). Immediate follow-up required.

Ticket ID{{ $json.ticket_id }}
Score{{ $json.satisfaction_score }}/5 — {{ $json.score_label }}
Logged At{{ $json.logged_at_readable }}
DB Update Query{{ $json.db_query }}

Required Action: Please reach out to this student personally within 1 hour. Our current avg satisfaction is 2.9/5 — we need to recover this ticket. A personal call or WhatsApp message goes a long way.

Senior Support / Operations Lead — please coordinate on this one.

nodes.name: Email Team - Poor Score Alert
nodes.notes: Alerts Senior Support and Operations Lead when a student gives 1 or 2 star rating.

nodes.name: Log Score to DB
nodes.notes: Replace with Postgres node. Runs UPDATE tickets SET satisfaction_score=X WHERE ticket_id=Y
